title: lepechinia mexicana
intro: Lepechinia mexicana, also known as Mexican hyssop or Mexican mint marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Mexico and parts of Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lepechinia mexicana include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even serving as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Lepechinia mexicana can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil for topical use, and it is also used in herbal preparations to make salves and ointments for skin issues and wounds.
